evals.prompt: 帮我检视这个 GitCode PR：https://gitcode.com/openharmony/demo_service/pull/321。请先获取 PR 元数据、diff 和评论，再结合本地仓库代码给出评审意见；如果当前仓库无法推断 repo，请明确说明需要传入 --repo openharmony/demo_service。
evals.expected_output: Agent 应先规范化 PR URL，使用 collect_pr_context.py 或等价 oh-gc 命令采集 pr-view、diff、name-only、文本 diff、PR 评论和 diff 评论；从 summary.json、pr-diff.txt、pr-view.json 开始阅读；若无法从本地 GitCode remote 推断仓库，应要求或使用 --repo openharmony/demo_service；不得只凭 URL 或 diff 摘要直接给结论。
expectations: Agent 使用 scripts/normalize_pr_ref.py 或等价逻辑从 URL 提取 PR 号 321 和 repo openharmony/demo_service
Agent 调用 scripts/collect_pr_context.py，或明确列出需要执行的 oh-gc pr view/diff/name-only/comments 命令来生成 .review-gitcode-pr 产物
Agent 说明采集后优先读取 summary.json、pr-diff.txt、pr-view.json，而不是默认加载全部原始 JSON
Agent 在 repo 无法从当前 GitCode remote 推断时使用或要求 --repo openharmony/demo_service
Agent 不在缺少 PR artifact 和本地代码上下文时声称已经完成深度评审

evals.prompt: 请在 evals/files/deep-review-contract-regression 这个离线工作区里评审 GitCode PR #101。该目录已经包含 .review-gitcode-pr/pr-101 产物和本地代码，请不要联网提交评论，只输出评审发现。
evals.expected_output: Agent 应读取 summary.json、pr-diff.txt、pr-view.json，并检查 src/session_manager.cpp 的本地实现、src/account_service.cpp 调用方和 tests/session_manager_test.cpp。应发现 line 18 将非正 expireAtMs 当作未过期，破坏调用方和既有测试对缺失过期时间必须重新认证的契约；以 medium finding 输出，包含 src/session_manager.cpp:18、具体证据和修复建议。
expectations: Agent explicitly reads or cites summary.json, pr-diff.txt, and pr-view.json before giving findings
Agent inspects at least one local caller, specifically src/account_service.cpp
Agent inspects related tests, specifically tests/session_manager_test.cpp
Agent reports a medium finding for src/session_manager.cpp line 18 or otherwise targets the commentable new-side line for the changed return
Finding explains that expireAtMs <= 0 now returns false, so sessions with missing expiry bypass re-authentication
Finding evidence ties together the changed branch, AccountService::RequireFreshSession, and the ExpiredWhenTimestampMissing test expectation
Finding includes a concrete fix such as preserving expireAtMs <= 0 as expired or updating callers/tests only if the contract intentionally changes
Agent does not stop after diff-only inspection and does not classify the file as mechanical-low-risk

evals.prompt: 请在 evals/files/no-finding-mechanical-log 这个离线工作区里评审 GitCode PR #102。该目录已经包含 .review-gitcode-pr/pr-102 产物和本地代码。若没有发现问题，请按 skill 要求输出无发现结论。
evals.expected_output: Agent 应完成文件覆盖后再给出无发现结论。输出应包含每个变更文件的 review status，说明检查了 metrics_logger.cpp 的调用路径和 metrics_logger_test.cpp，列出已验证的 checklist 类别、未完全验证项和残余风险；不得只写 LGTM、looks good 或一行 no issue。
expectations: Agent assigns a final status to src/metrics_logger.cpp, such as reviewed or mechanical-low-risk, and does not omit changed-file coverage
Agent states that only a log message string changed and verifies this against local code context
Agent inspects or cites tests/metrics_logger_test.cpp when explaining why behavior is unchanged
Agent includes checklist coverage with verified categories and at least one not-fully-verified limitation
Agent includes concrete residual risk rather than style commentary
Agent does not invent style-only findings or generic recommendations just to produce a finding

evals.prompt: 请在 evals/files/submission-preview 这个离线工作区里，把 findings.json 转成 GitCode review 草稿并预览将要提交的命令。不要真正提交；请告诉我会发几条评论，等待我确认。
evals.expected_output: Agent 应使用 prepare_review_submission.py --context-dir .review-gitcode-pr/pr-103 --findings findings.json --write-draft review-draft.json 进行预览，不带 --execute；应生成 review-draft.json，校验 line comment 目标在 summary.json 的 commentable_lines 中，展示评论数量和命令预览，并明确需要用户确认后才可执行。
expectations: Agent runs or instructs the exact preview flow using scripts/prepare_review_submission.py with --findings and --write-draft
Agent does not use --execute and does not call oh-gc pr comment or oh-gc pr review directly
Agent validates that src/session_manager.cpp line 18 is commentable according to summary.json
Agent reports the planned comment count before any execution
Agent explains that explicit user confirmation is required before executing the same command with --execute
Generated or described submitted comment body is Chinese Markdown with paragraphs or bullets, not a single pipe-delimited finding line
Agent does not set approve true because the findings contain a blocking or unresolved issue
